name: Tikis Grill & Bar
tagline: Waikiki's oceanfront tiki bar with live music nightly, strong mai tais, and a 2nd-floor perch overlooking the beach.
parking: Waikiki street parking; Aston Waikiki Beach Hotel parking garage
bestTime: Arrive by 5pm for a railing seat at sunset. Happy hour 2–5pm for drink specials
talkStory: Tikis is one of the few spots in Waikiki where you can sit oceanfront, drink a proper mai tai, and listen to live Hawaiian music without the price tag of a resort restaurant. Located on the 2nd floor of the Aston Waikiki Beach Hotel, the open-air lanai overlooks Kuhio Beach. The food is decent but secondary — tiki cocktails and the vibe are the draw. Live music every night from local acts. At 4.6 stars with over 10,000 reviews, it's the most consistently well-reviewed bar in Waikiki. Tourist-friendly but genuinely fun.
